report_name: Irish Healthcare Recruiter Healthdaq Investigating Cyber Security Incident

identities.name: Healthdaq
identities.description: A healthcare recruitment company operating in the Republic of Ireland and Northern Ireland that was the target of a cybersecurity incident.

identities.name: Garda National Cyber Crime Bureau
identities.description: The Irish national law enforcement agency investigating the cybersecurity incident at Healthdaq.

identities.name: Department of Health in Northern Ireland
identities.description: A government health agency in Northern Ireland and a client of Healthdaq.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b1a3c4d-5e6f-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.itv.com/news/utv/2026-04-11/healthcare-recruitment-company-says-gardai-probing-cyber-security-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-12
modified: 2026-04-12
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative activity, though rare.
level: high
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a behavior suggested for monitoring in the article as a sign of a potential ransomware attack.

indicators.name: Ransomware File Encryption Detected by Extension
indicators.pattern:
title: Ransomware File Encryption Detected by Extension
id: 8d7c6b5a-4f3e-4d2c-1b0a-9e8f7d6c5b4a
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with common ransomware-associated extensions, indicating a potential Data Encrypted for Impact attack.
references:
  - https://www.itv.com/news/utv/2026-04-11/healthcare-recruitment-company-says-gardai-probing-cyber-security-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-12
modified: 2026-04-12
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|re: '\.(locked|enc|crypt|L0CKED|KEY|dark)$'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate files that coincidentally use one of these extensions.
level: high
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with extensions commonly used by ransomware, a detection strategy suggested in the article.
